MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Everett Hewlett Jr.; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Delaware Lakewood Apartments, is present. Represented by Haley Gonzaba
Attorney, Ivy Tseng, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Paul Quilici, is present.
Attorney, John Weinstein , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 306A, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of NOV-22-2010 remains on calendar.
